problems_encountered.description: HTTP 403 error when attempting to list Redis versions. API endpoint /v2/redis-versions returned 403 Forbidden.

tool_response_summary: Failed with 403 Forbidden error. The authenticated user may lack permissions to access Redis version information.
execution_notes: Tool executed but API returned permission denied. This may be due to insufficient privileges or API endpoint access restrictions. The tool call itself worked correctly but the operation was rejected by the API.
